overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dark medieval village at night. The character moves along wooden plank pathways, passes through a fortified timber gatehouse, and encounters villagers in the torch-lit streets under stormy overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village square with timber fortifications

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along wooden planks toward a fortified timber gatehouse with swords strapped to his back

entered.detail: large fortified wooden gatehouse with archway passage and crenellated roof
timber-framed building with steep thatched roof and warm interior lighting
wooden wagon with large spoked wheels parked beside the path
tall wooden watchtower with platform and ladder
burning campfire with orange flames near a wooden structure
external wooden staircase leading to upper level of building

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through an open medieval village square with timber-framed buildings and thatched roofs. The ground is covered with wooden planks and dirt, and a fortified gatehouse looms ahead under dark overcast skies. A campfire burns in the distance while wooden structures line the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden archway passage through fortifications

events.description: entering the dark covered timber archway, significantly reducing ambient light
villager NPC becomes visible standing in the archway exit ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the dark enclosed archway passage toward the light at the far end

notable_agents.action: villager in red dress standing in the archway exit facing toward Geralt

entered.detail: tall stone tower with narrow windows visible through the archway exit

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a dark covered timber archway that serves as a fortified passage through the village wall. The lighting drops significantly as wooden support beams frame the view. A stone tower becomes visible through the distant archway exit where a villager stands waiting.

scene_state.functional_zone: village street beyond the gate with timber houses

events.description: exiting the covered archway into the open village street beyond the fortifications
passing by villagers on the left and right sides of the narrow street

agents.ego_description: Geralt emerging from the archway and walking past villagers in the torch-lit street beyond the gate

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress walking along the left side of the street
woman in beige dress and red skirt walking away from the camera

entered.detail: narrow dirt street lined with medieval timber buildings extending into the distance
cluster of wooden village houses with lit windows and timber framing

segments.scene_description: Geralt exits the fortified archway into a narrow village street lined with timber houses. The ground transitions from wooden planks to dirt. Two women villagers walk along the street as Geralt passes them, with a stone tower visible in the distance and warm light glowing from building windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open medieval village square through a fortified passage and into a narrow residential street. It begins with Geralt walking across wooden planks and dirt beneath dark overcast skies, passing timber-framed buildings toward a looming gatehouse. As he enters the fortified archway, the environment shifts into a dark, enclosed space framed by heavy wooden support beams, with a distant stone tower appearing through the exit. The scene then opens as he emerges from the shadows into a narrow street where the ground transitions back to dirt and warm light glows from the windows of nearby houses. Finally, the camera follows him past two women villagers walking along the path toward the stone tower in the distance.
